source_pr.title: pkg/session/test/txn: increase txn_test timeout budget to moderate
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #66040

Problem Summary:
`//pkg/session/test/txn:txn_test` is configured with `timeout = "short"` (150s in CI), while shard `2/11` repeatedly runs close to that limit due to `TestTxnLazyInitialize` taking ~112-126s in race+coverage mode. This causes flaky timeout failures after test logic passes.

### What changed and how does it work?
- Updated `pkg/session/test/txn/BUILD.bazel` to set `txn_test` timeout from `short` to `moderate`.
- This increases the allowed execution budget for the slow shard so retries are less likely to fail on timeout when tests themselves pass.

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

failure_signature: `//pkg/session/test/txn:txn_test` is configured with `timeout = "short"` (150s in CI), while shard `2/11` repeatedly runs close to that limit due to `TestTxnLazyInitialize` taking ~112-126s in race+coverage mode. This causes flaky timeout failures after test logic passes.
root_cause_explanation: The Bazel test shard was flaky due to a too-tight `timeout = "short"` budget: the shard consistently ran close to the CI limit in race/coverage mode, causing timeouts even when test logic passed. The PR raises the timeout to `moderate`, reducing spurious timeout failures caused by CI load.
